description: A frozen dessert typically made from cream, milk, sugar, and flavorings such as vanilla, chocolate, fruit, or nuts. Texture ranges from dense and rich to lighter churned styles.
preparation_steps: Prepare or combine the base ingredients.
Churn and freeze until thick and smooth.
Add mix-ins if desired and freeze until ready to serve.

health_advice.benefits: Mainly enjoyed for taste and pleasure rather than as a nutritionally balanced food.
health_advice.risks: Often high in sugar and saturated fat, especially in premium or heavily mixed versions.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Keep portions moderate and treat it as an occasional dessert.

dietary_notes.note: Traditional ice cream is vegetarian but not vegan because it contains dairy and sometimes eggs. Vegan and gluten-free varieties are available, but mix-ins can change this.

allergens: Gluten in cookie or cake mix-ins
